_comment: SYNTHETIC reference procedures (Evidence class 3). Fictional step-by-step procedures, keyed by procedure id; failure modes reference them by id. No licensed content.

clean_photoeye.title: Clean & verify a photoeye sensor
steps: Lock out / tag out the conveyor drive.
Wipe the photoeye lens and the reflector with a lint-free cloth.
Clear the sensing path and confirm the indicator LED toggles.
Verify alignment to the reflector and the sensing distance.
Restore power and confirm the Blocked state clears.

clear_conveyor_jam.title: Clear a conveyor mechanical jam
steps: Lock out / tag out the conveyor drive.
Locate and remove the jammed product or foreign object.
Inspect for a seized roller or failed bearing (rotate by hand).
Clear the drive overcurrent fault and restore power.
Confirm smooth running and that counts resume.

reenable_vfd.title: Re-enable a disabled VFD
steps: Confirm the run permissive chain (e-stop, guards, upstream ready).
Verify the drive Enable input is energized.
Clear any latched drive fault.
Issue run and confirm the motor turns.

clear_motor_overload.title: Investigate a motor overload trip
steps: Read the overload/drive trip code and last current peak.
Lock out and rotate the shaft by hand to feel for binding.
Confirm the load is free before resetting the overload.
Reset and monitor current on restart.

recalibrate_sensor.title: Recalibrate a process sensor
steps: Compare the live value to an independent reference.
Inspect the sensor for coating, scaling, or a loose fitting.
Recalibrate per the SOP.
Re-verify against the reference and log the calibration.

restore_plant_air.title: Restore plant air pressure
steps: Read the header pressure against the spec.
Check the compressor run state and dryer fault.
Walk the line for an audible leak or stuck actuator.
Repair the leak / restore the compressor and confirm pressure.

restore_interlock.title: Restore a safety interlock
steps: Identify which guard/interlock reads open.
Confirm the guard is closed and the switch actuates.
Inspect the switch and wiring per the safety procedure.
Reset and confirm the machine is permitted to start.

restore_comms.title: Restore device communications
steps: Confirm link/activity LEDs and ping the device.
Check for a duplicate address or failed switch port.
Verify the driver/connection status in the gateway.
Confirm tags refresh and the machine resumes.
